summary: Morning cycle. Wins: PR #1296 merged (CI skip workflow), main/master divergence detected and PR #1298 filed to fix. Version drift resolved — cloud+analytics both on 2.9.3. Swarm P0 #1186 closed. Dogfood #1254 closed. New blockers: Swarm P0 #1289 (credit exhaustion, 26.5% failures, external), KE-2 #917 unstarted 5th cycle, hook DX bugs #1276+#1292, main/master divergence #1297.

details.title: fix(ci): port ci-skip-site.yml to main
details.note: Created this cycle. Ports ci-skip-site.yml from master to main. Must merge before #1293.

details.title: fix(site): update AAB action types count 27/9 → 41/10
details.note: Blocked pending #1298 merge. Branch updated, CodeQL passed. Will get lint+test-and-build after ci-skip-site.yml lands in main.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Hook exits non-zero when allowing — causes GitHub write blocks after 1st call
dogfoodPatterns.description: Two related issues: (1) #1276: PreToolUse hook says 'allowed by default' but exits non-zero. Claude Code treats non-zero as a block. QA agent capped at 1 GitHub issue create per session. (2) #1292: hook stderr outputs appear as 'blocking error' system-reminders even for allowed actions. Permissive decisions look identical to blocks from agent perspective.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Fix claude-hook-wrapper.sh to only write to stderr on actual blocks. For allow decisions, use exit 0 with no output or stdout-only JSON. This is a P1 DX regression affecting multiple agent types.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Hook persona identity bridge fails silently
dogfoodPatterns.description: agent-identity-bridge.sh fails (exit 128) before claude-init runs, so persona is set to wrong role. Result: claude-code:unknown:developer instead of the registered agent identity.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add error handling to agent-identity-bridge.sh; fail loudly and abort claude-init if bridge fails.

dogfoodPatterns.description: Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as unknown.

crossCuttingIssues.title: Swarm Health P0 — 26.5% failures (credit/quota exhaustion)
crossCuttingIssues.description: 169 credit_balance_too_low/402 quota errors across all 4 driver types (claude-code: 73, copilot: 32, gemini: 27, codex: 24). 35/132 agents failed in last 24h. Root cause is external (billing/quota). No cron collisions, no stuck worktrees.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Human: replenish API credits across all 4 driver accounts

crossCuttingIssues.title: KE-2 ActionContext — unstarted 5th cycle
crossCuttingIssues.description: 0/4 checkboxes, no assignee, no PR. Blocks v3.0, Phase 7, KE-5. Sprint goal at serious risk.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Escalate to director — assign kernel-sr immediately

crossCuttingIssues.title: main/master branch divergence — infra P1
crossCuttingIssues.description: main and master have diverged 8+ commits. master has older codex/gemini additions + new ci-skip-site.yml. main has all v2.9.x kernel work. Some agents target master, some target main. PR #1296 accidentally merged to master instead of main.
crossCuttingIssues.action: PR #1298 created to port ci-skip-site.yml. Full reconciliation needs human decision: deprecate master or rebase main on master?

crossCuttingIssues.title: Hook DX: non-zero exit on allow decisions blocks GitHub writes
crossCuttingIssues.description: claude-hook-wrapper.sh exits non-zero even when action is allowed. Claude Code treats non-zero PreToolUse as block. Related: hook stderr appears as 'blocking error' in system-reminders.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Kernel squad fix: exit 0 on allow, stderr → stdout for allow decisions
